title: Officially Closed
content:
Hello Readers,

Over the past few years, I've had so much good time sharing my thoughts on the matters that caught (my) attention with you guys. And I've got so many valuable feedbacks on various matters. In fact, I'm still having so much fun writing.

However, every party must end at some point. This party is no exception. I've decided to close the lid of my thoughtsbox. Every single article will be kept neatly in the "archive":/tbox/archives/.

I'm not saying that I'll not be writing again. But don't take that as a promise.

Okay now, thank you for dropping by and I wish you all good luck.

See you around on the Internet

P.S. You can always contact me at the usual email or on IM (when I don't post Busy sign, of course).
